summary: Account & Settings Page Redesign - All tests passed. Backend 37/37 tests passed. Frontend fully verified including AccountPage (/account) with Personal Info, Subscription, Password, Notifications, Privacy, Danger Zone; SettingsPage (/athlete-settings) with Appearance, Gmail, Team Management, Privacy toggles, Guided Tour; and Sidebar with Profile, Account, Settings navigation links.
seed_data_creation: Test invitations created via backend tests (test_invite_*, test_pending_*, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account & Settings redesign fully tested. Key findings: 1) AccountPage at /account works with all sections: Personal Info (edit button opens form with save/cancel), Subscription card (shows Pro Plan $29/month, Schools 12/25, AI drafts 0/10, Upgrade button), Change Password (3 fields with validation), Notifications (2 toggles), Privacy (data export), Danger Zone (delete with confirmation). 2) SettingsPage at /athlete-settings works with: Appearance section (Dark/Light/System theme selectors), Gmail Integration (shows 'Not connected' state with Connect button), Team section (shows owner Emma Chen, pending invitations, invite form, 'How it works' accordion), Privacy toggles (inbound scan, email notifications), Guided Tour (replay button). 3) Sidebar has 10 navigation items for athletes including Profile, Account, Settings links all working. 4) Team API (POST /api/team/invite) works and creates pending invitations displayed in UI. 5) Theme changes persist via localStorage and backend.

feature_coverage.personal_info_edit_mode: PASS - Edit button switches to form with Save/Cancel
feature_coverage.subscription_card: PASS - Shows Pro Plan, usage bars, Upgrade button
feature_coverage.team_section: PASS - Owner info, members, pending invites

frontend_verification.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All 3 new links (Profile, Account, Settings) found
frontend_verification.team_section: PASS - Owner, invites, form all visible
